project.name: 健身饮食管理
project.designRead: Health & fitness SaaS dashboard / active fitness users / vibrant sporty energy / medium density / avoid neon glow
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Vibrant fitness SaaS, emerald green + energy orange, Outfit + Inter, animated progress rings, data-rich dashboard with card layout

pages.title: 首页仪表盘
pages.visualNorthStar: Hero ring progress indicators for calories, protein, carbs; quick-add meal CTA with energetic animation

continuityAnchors.sharedHeader: Top nav with logo, search, notifications, avatar
continuityAnchors.sharedSidebar: Left sidebar with nav items and icons
continuityAnchors.sharedCardStyle: White cards with subtle border, rounded-lg, hover lift
continuityAnchors.sharedCTAStyle: Primary green CTA buttons with bounce hover
continuityAnchors.sharedProgressStyle: Circular SVG progress rings with animated stroke-dasharray

pages.requirements: REQ-FEATURE-001: Daily calorie/macro overview with circular progress rings. REQ-FEATURE-002: Quick-add meal button. REQ-FEATURE-003: Water intake tracker. REQ-FEATURE-004: Recent meals list. REQ-FEATURE-005: Weekly summary mini chart.

pages.title: 饮食计划
pages.visualNorthStar: Toggle between fat-loss and muscle-gain plans with animated switch; weekly meal calendar with color-coded macro bars

continuityAnchors.sharedHeader: Top nav with logo, search, notifications, avatar
continuityAnchors.sharedSidebar: Left sidebar with nav items and icons
continuityAnchors.sharedCardStyle: White cards with subtle border, rounded-lg, hover lift
continuityAnchors.sharedCTAStyle: Primary green CTA buttons with bounce hover

pages.requirements: REQ-FEATURE-010: Plan type selector (fat-loss / muscle-gain). REQ-FEATURE-011: Daily calorie target with macro split. REQ-FEATURE-012: Weekly meal plan grid with meals per slot. REQ-FEATURE-013: Edit plan button per meal slot. REQ-FEATURE-014: Macro breakdown per meal with progress bars.

pages.title: 每日记录
pages.visualNorthStar: Timeline-based meal log with expandable nutrient breakdown cards; real-time running totals with animated counters

continuityAnchors.sharedHeader: Top nav with logo, search, notifications, avatar
continuityAnchors.sharedSidebar: Left sidebar with nav items and icons
continuityAnchors.sharedCardStyle: White cards with subtle border, rounded-lg, hover lift
continuityAnchors.sharedCTAStyle: Primary green CTA buttons with bounce hover

pages.requirements: REQ-FEATURE-020: Date picker to select tracking day. REQ-FEATURE-021: Meal slots (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack) with food items. REQ-FEATURE-022: Each food item shows carb, protein, fat, calories. REQ-FEATURE-023: Add food button per meal slot. REQ-FEATURE-024: Running daily totals sidebar with plan comparison. REQ-FEATURE-025: Color-coded status when exceeding plan targets.

pages.title: 食物库
pages.visualNorthStar: Search-forward food database with instant results grid; each food card shows key macros at a glance with tap-to-add interaction

continuityAnchors.sharedHeader: Top nav with logo, search, notifications, avatar
continuityAnchors.sharedSidebar: Left sidebar with nav items and icons
continuityAnchors.sharedCardStyle: White cards with subtle border, rounded-lg, hover lift
continuityAnchors.sharedCTAStyle: Primary green CTA buttons with bounce hover

pages.requirements: REQ-FEATURE-030: Search bar with auto-complete. REQ-FEATURE-031: Food category filters. REQ-FEATURE-032: Food cards showing name, calories, protein, carbs, fat per serving. REQ-FEATURE-033: Add to meal button. REQ-FEATURE-034: Custom food creation form.

pages.title: 数据分析
pages.visualNorthStar: Multi-chart analytics dashboard with animated line/bar charts; trend indicators with up/down arrows and color-coded badges

continuityAnchors.sharedHeader: Top nav with logo, search, notifications, avatar
continuityAnchors.sharedSidebar: Left sidebar with nav items and icons
continuityAnchors.sharedCardStyle: White cards with subtle border, rounded-lg, hover lift
continuityAnchors.sharedCTAStyle: Primary green CTA buttons with bounce hover

pages.requirements: REQ-FEATURE-040: Weekly calorie trend line chart. REQ-FEATURE-041: Macro distribution donut chart. REQ-FEATURE-042: Weight progression chart. REQ-FEATURE-043: Streak counter and consistency score. REQ-FEATURE-044: Period selector (week/month/3-month).

pages.title: AI 助手
pages.visualNorthStar: Full-screen chat interface with typing animation; AI avatar with pulse animation; contextual diet suggestions with inline food cards

continuityAnchors.sharedHeader: Top nav with logo, search, notifications, avatar
continuityAnchors.sharedSidebar: Left sidebar with nav items and icons
continuityAnchors.sharedCardStyle: White cards with subtle border, rounded-lg, hover lift
continuityAnchors.sharedCTAStyle: Primary green CTA buttons with bounce hover

pages.requirements: REQ-FEATURE-050: Chat message thread with user/AI bubbles. REQ-FEATURE-051: AI typing indicator animation. REQ-FEATURE-052: Suggested quick questions chips. REQ-FEATURE-053: Inline food recommendation cards within chat. REQ-FEATURE-054: Context-aware: AI can see user's current plan and daily intake.

pages.title: 个人中心
pages.visualNorthStar: Profile header with gradient banner and avatar; body metric cards with animated number transitions; goal toggle with smooth slide animation

pages.requirements: REQ-FEATURE-060: User avatar and basic info. REQ-FEATURE-061: Body metrics (weight, height, age, gender). REQ-FEATURE-062: Goal selector (fat-loss / muscle-gain / maintain). REQ-FEATURE-063: Daily calorie target calculator. REQ-FEATURE-064: Account settings.
